instruction: Classify the player's support ticket into a category.
baseline_prompt: You are a game player-support assistant. Classify the player's support ticket into a category. Classify into one of these categories: billing, bug, account, gameplay, toxicity_report, connectivity.
source: Authored for TEI-Bench (Sonnet-generated, Sonnet-validated; kept only label-agreed examples).

train.query: I'd like to request a refund for the season pass. The content didn't match what was advertised in the promotional materials.
I saved my progress right before logging out yesterday, but when I came back today the game loaded me back to a checkpoint from three hours earlier and I lost all that progress.
My session keeps getting terminated every few minutes saying 'logged in from another location' but I'm the only one who knows my password.
I just unlocked the skill tree but I'm confused about whether I should focus on strength or agility for a stealth build. Any recommendations?
Reporting user ShadowNinja for doxing threats and extreme harassment. They said they would find my personal information and post it online after I beat them in a 1v1. I'm genuinely concerned.
Can't join any online sessions at all. Every time I try to connect, I get an error message saying the server is unavailable, but my friends are all playing just fine right now.
My son made unauthorized purchases on my account totaling over $200. How do I dispute these charges?
The frame rate drops to almost zero whenever there's a explosion or fire effect on screen, making combat sections basically unplayable.
Can you help me unlink my old social media connection and set up a direct login instead? I no longer have access to that platform.
I'm trying to complete the combo move that requires jumping then attacking mid-air, but my character just does a regular attack. What's the correct button sequence?
Someone named CoolKid2010 has been spamming hateful homophobic slurs in the general chat for the past hour. Multiple people have asked them to stop but they keep going. Please take action.
My game freezes for 2-3 seconds repeatedly during matches, then everyone jumps to different positions. This lag spike issue has been happening for the past two days.
I need help cancelling my auto-renewal for the VIP membership before the next billing cycle starts tomorrow.
I'm experiencing a weird issue where all the sound effects disappear after about 20 minutes of gameplay. Music still plays but no footsteps, weapon sounds, or dialogue audio.
I created a profile on my brother's console by mistake and now I want to transfer everything to my own credentials. Is that possible?

test.query: I'm trying to figure out how the crafting system works. I have all the materials in my inventory but the combine button is greyed out. What am I missing?
There was someone in my squad earlier using a racist username and posting hate symbols in the team chat. Their tag was something like SS_Commander and they were making everyone uncomfortable.
Experiencing massive rubber-banding where my character teleports backward every few seconds. Makes it impossible to aim or move properly in any match.
The promotional discount code wasn't applied to my order but I was charged the full price. Can you honor the advertised discount?
The character model keeps clipping through walls in the marketplace area, and sometimes I fall through the floor entirely and have to restart from my last save point.
I forgot the email I used to register three years ago and now I can't reset my credentials. Is there any way to verify my identity through purchase history or something?
Does the damage from poison effects stack if I apply multiple debuffs, or does it just refresh the duration?

I was just in a match with someone named xXDarkSlayer99 who spent the entire game sending hateful messages in chat about my race and threatening me. This person needs to be banned immediately. I have screenshots if needed.
Unable to maintain a stable connection during peak hours. The game works fine in the morning but becomes a stuttering mess every evening between 6-10 PM.
I'm trying to purchase the premium edition upgrade but my payment keeps getting declined even though my card has sufficient funds.
My inventory shows I have 47 health potions but when I try to use them nothing happens and the count doesn't go down. They're completely unusable.
I think my credentials were compromised because I'm getting emails about login attempts from Russia. I need to secure my profile immediately.
What's the difference between critical hits and headshot damage? Do they stack or is it one or the other?

During my last three games, a player called NightmareRush has been targeting me specifically with sexist insults and inappropriate comments. I feel very uncomfortable and don't want to encounter this person again.
I keep getting kicked out of matches every 5-10 minutes and it's ruining my ranked games. My internet connection is fine for everything else, but this game just won't stay stable.
I bought 5000 gems but only 3000 appeared in my account. The full amount was withdrawn from my bank account though.
My character animation is stuck in the crouching position even when I'm running and jumping. It looks ridiculous and I can't fix it even after reloading.
I've been trying to log in for the past hour but it keeps saying my password is incorrect. I'm certain I'm using the right one. Can you help me get back into my profile?
What's the maximum level for weapons? Mine is at level 15 and the upgrade option disappeared from the blacksmith menu.
A player kept teamkilling me on purpose and laughing about it in voice comms while using ableist slurs. Username is ProGamer420 and this happened around 3pm today on the Desert Storm map.
Keep getting timeout errors when trying to load into multiplayer lobbies. Takes forever to connect and then half the time it just fails completely.
My credit card shows a pending transaction from three days ago but I never received the in-game currency I paid for. Order number is #GX-4429-LP.
There's a visual glitch where enemy health bars stay on screen even after they're defeated, and after a few battles my entire screen is covered with floating red bars.
I want to enable additional security features on my profile after hearing about recent hacking incidents. What options do you offer?
